title: Rosa × dumetorum eulanceolata
taxonomy: Rosa × dumetorum eulanceolata is a synonym for Rosa dumetorum, which is a species of rose that belongs to the genus Rosa and the family Rosaceae. The family Rosaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the rose family. Rosa dumetorum is native to Europe and is classified as an evergreen shrub. It is a member of the subgenus Caninae within the genus Rosa. Rosa × dumetorum eulanceolata is considered to be an invalid name, making the correct classification of the species as Rosa dumetorum.
properties: Rosa × dumetorum eulanceolata, a specific species of rose, is known for its potential therapeutic properties. The plant has been studied for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Additionally, the plant is believed to possess antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it a potential natural remedy for skin infections and wounds. Further research is needed to fully understand the therapeutic potential of Rosa × dumetorum eulanceolata. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
